game_text: Generates 1 Infrastructure resource each turn. If damaged Blue Team loses 1 SCP.
flavor_text: The well is where the service starts.
learning_note: Wells are critical physical assets in water systems.

game_text: Generates 1 Infrastructure resource each turn. If damaged Blue Team loses 2 SCP.
learning_note: Water towers affect service pressure and community impact.

game_text: Once per turn move 1 Defense from this Asset to another Infrastructure Asset.
learning_note: Pump stations support distribution and recovery.

game_text: If damaged discard 1 card unless Field Tech or Water Quality Monitor is active.
learning_note: Chemical treatment systems have direct public safety impact.

game_text: Protocol cards attached to this Asset cost 1 less to play.
learning_note: RTUs and PLCs bridge cyber systems and physical operations.

game_text: The first Internet Attack against this Asset each game deals 1 less damage.
learning_note: Gateways need monitoring and hardening.

game_text: If an Operator is active this Asset gains plus 1 Defense.
flavor_text: A wireless path became a checkpoint.
learning_note: Wireless access must be secured and monitored.

game_text: Tools cost 1 less to play while this Asset is active.
learning_note: Engineering workstations need strong controls.

game_text: When defended by OT Engineer this Asset gains plus 2 Defense.
flavor_text: The plant is the heart of operations.
learning_note: Treatment plants combine cyber and physical risk.

game_text: If attacked from Internet look at the top 2 Red Team cards and reorder them.
learning_note: SCADA interfaces require access control and monitoring.

game_text: If Password Reset or MFA is active reduce Credential Attack damage by 1.
learning_note: Operator endpoints need strong identity protection.

game_text: Internet Attacks against Infrastructure Assets cost Red Team 1 additional resource.
flavor_text: The perimeter grew into a checkpoint.
learning_note: Enterprise firewalls reduce opportunistic paths.

game_text: If damaged draw 1 card then discard 1 card.
flavor_text: Records became part of the risk.
learning_note: Business systems can affect response and trust.

game_text: The first Delivery phase Attack each game deals 1 less damage.
learning_note: Email availability matters during response.

game_text: Restore 2 Defense to one damaged Infrastructure Asset.
learning_note: Backups must be tested and protected.

game_text: Restore 2 Defense to one damaged Asset. If Backup is in play restore 1 additional Defense.
flavor_text: The second copy saved the day.
learning_note: Redundant backups improve resilience.

game_text: Reduce Credential Attack or account-access damage by 2.
learning_note: MFA reduces account takeover risk.

game_text: If a water utility Asset is damaged draw 1 card and restore 1 Defense to it.
learning_note: Monitoring helps detect unsafe process changes.

game_text: Look at the top 3 Red Team cards. You may discard one Recon card.
learning_note: Service awareness reduces exposure.

game_text: Reveal a Red Team Attack card in hand. That card costs 1 more next turn.
flavor_text: Weaknesses were found before the attacker.
learning_note: Scanning helps prioritize remediation.

game_text: When Red Team plays an Internet or Network Attack reduce damage by 1.
learning_note: Detection improves response but still needs analysis.

game_text: Reveal one hidden Red Team card affecting Infrastructure.
learning_note: IoT inventory helps defenders understand connected devices.

game_text: Attach to RTU/PLC or Pump Station. Attached Asset gains plus 1 Defense.
learning_note: Legacy protocols require segmentation and monitoring.

game_text: Attach to SCADA Web Interface or Email Server. Internet attacks cost 1 additional resource.
flavor_text: A common port required careful control.
learning_note: Common services need visibility and monitoring.

game_text: Attach to SCADA Web Interface. Reduce Internet attack damage by 1.
learning_note: TLS protects web access when configured correctly.

game_text: Attach to RTU/PLC. Once per turn restore 1 Defense to an Infrastructure Asset.
learning_note: Industrial protocols directly affect operations.

game_text: Restore 1 Defense to a Network or Endpoint Asset each turn.
learning_note: IT staff protect accounts and connectivity.

game_text: Restore 1 Defense to an Infrastructure Asset each turn.
flavor_text: The process expert knew the plant.
learning_note: OT expertise is critical for safe recovery.

game_text: When a Red Team Attack is played draw 1 card then discard 1 card.
learning_note: SOC analysts turn alerts into action.

game_text: Restore 2 Defense to one damaged water Asset.
flavor_text: Boots on the ground fixed what screens could not.
learning_note: Field teams support physical recovery.

game_text: Provides 1 Infrastructure resource.
learning_note: Operational funding supports day-to-day resilience.

game_text: Provides 2 Infrastructure resources for Assets or Defense. Discard after use.
learning_note: Capital funding supports major improvements.

game_text: Provides 1 Infrastructure resource and restores 1 Defense to a damaged Asset.
learning_note: Emergency funds help response during incidents.

game_text: Provides 2 Infrastructure resources. If a critical Asset is damaged draw 1 card.
learning_note: External assistance improves recovery.

game_text: Cancel one Credential Attack or restore 2 Defense to an Endpoint Asset.
flavor_text: The password changed before the attacker returned.
learning_note: Credential recovery limits compromise.

game_text: Remove one Malware or Remote Access effect from an Endpoint Asset.
learning_note: Endpoint protection reduces common malware risk.

game_text: Cancel one Recon card or reduce one Network Attack by 2 damage.
learning_note: Reducing exposed services limits attacker options.

game_text: Look at the top 3 Red Team cards. You may discard one Network card.
learning_note: Traffic analysis supports incident investigation.

game_text: Reduce the next Network Attack by 1. Draw 1 card.
learning_note: Monitoring improves detection and response.

game_text: Attach to Network Monitoring or SOC Analyst. Reveal the next Red Team card when attacked.
learning_note: Captures provide evidence for investigation.
